positive: A vibrant, geometric pattern design featuring stylized celestial bodies and mystical flora. The composition should be centered and highly detailed, evoking a neo-traditional tattoo aesthetic mixed with cosmic art. Main subjects include interlocking crescent moons, stylized constellations made of minimalist geometric lines, and whimsical, symmetrical jungle vines and blooms (e.g., stylized lotuses and hummingbirds). The style must be clean vector illustration with strong black outlines and limited, high-contrast color palette (e.g., deep indigo, metallic gold, emerald green, and stark white accents). Composition should be flat, repeating, and suitable for wrapping onto fabric. Ideal lighting is studio flash, emphasizing clean lines and crisp edges. Art should be highly detailed, print-ready, and bold.
negative: blur, low detail, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, messy, realistic photography, 3d render, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, ugly
